languages.text: "Вы, как я вижу, и сами умеете играть в придворные игры. Хорошо. Буду ждать вашего знака, мил{mf|ый|ая}".

traits.locale_text: "Вы, как я вижу, и сами умеете играть в придворные игры. Хорошо. Буду ждать вашего знака, мил{mf|ый|ая}".

languages.text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."
languages.original_text: "Вы, как я вижу, и сами умеете играть в придворные игры. Хорошо. Буду ждать вашего знака, мил{mf|ый|ая}".

traits.locale_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."
"You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."
"You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

languages.text: “看来你也很会玩这些宫廷把戏。很好。我等你的信号，亲爱的。”
languages.original_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

traits.locale_text: “看来你也很会玩这些宫廷把戏。很好。我等你的信号，亲爱的。”

languages.text: « Je vois que vous savez vous-même jouer aux jeux de la cour. Très bien. J'attendrai un signe de votre part, {mf|mon cher|ma chère}. »
languages.original_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois que vous savez vous-même jouer aux jeux de la cour. Très bien. J'attendrai un signe de votre part, {mf|mon cher|ma chère}. »

languages.text: "Siz de anlıyorum ki saray oyunlarında oldukça ustasınız. Güzel. İşaretinizi bekleyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

traits.locale_text: "Siz de anlıyorum ki saray oyunlarında oldukça ustasınız. Güzel. İşaretinizi bekleyeceğim."

languages.text: «Veo que usted también sabe algo de los juegos de la corte. Bien. Esperaré su señal, querid{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

traits.locale_text: «Veo que usted también sabe algo de los juegos de la corte. Bien. Esperaré su señal, querid{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: "Wie ich sehe, seid Ihr mit höfischen Spielen ebenfalls vertraut. Gut. Ich warte auf Euer Zeichen, Schätzchen."
languages.original_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

traits.locale_text: "Wie ich sehe, seid Ihr mit höfischen Spielen ebenfalls vertraut. Gut. Ich warte auf Euer Zeichen, Schätzchen."

languages.text: 「あなたは、宮廷の駆け引きに巧みですね。いいでしょう。あなたのサインを待っていますわ。」
languages.original_text: "You, I see, are adept at playing courtly games yourself. Good. I shall await your sign, my dear."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは、宮廷の駆け引きに巧みですね。いいでしょう。あなたのサインを待っていますわ。」
